articles.author: Arjun Kharpal
articles.title: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation - CNBC
articles.description: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.
articles.content:
European defense startup Helsing said Monday it has raised $1.8 billion in a funding round that values the German firm at $18 billion.
New and existing investors participated in the funding, includi… [+1440 chars]
